channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Penn State's Guy Gadowsky named Coach of the Year finalist
item.description: (WHTM) — Penn State men's hockey head coach Guy Gadowsky has been named a Coach of the Year finalist. Gadowsky is 1 of 10 finalists for the Spencer Penrose Award, which is presented annually to the men’s ice hockey Division I Coach of the Year.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: Milwaukee pays tribute to Bob Uecker in Brewers' first home game since his death
item.description: The Milwaukee Brewers were conducting a moment of silence before their home opener to honor Bob Uecker when one fan decided keeping quiet wasn’t the best way to pay tribute to the lovable loquacious broadcaster.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Stanford hires Frank Reich as interim football coach
item.description: STANFORD, Calif. (AP) — Andrew Luck picked a familiar face to take over as Stanford's interim football coach, hiring former NFL coach Frank Reich on Monday to replace the fired Troy Taylor.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dan Mullen, awed by UNLV facilities, says timing felt right to make return to coaching
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Dan Mullen could've returned to coaching sooner, but the timing never seemed right and, regardless, he was fine remaining at ESPN giving his insights about the latest in college football.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine school officials explain why state was in 'noncompliance with Title IX' after referral to DOJ
item.description: Maine school officials explained why they were unable to sign the Trump administration's agreement to keep trans athletes out of girls' and women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kanon Catchings enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a disappointing freshman season, BYU forward Kanon Catchings has entered the transfer portal. The highly-touted 4-star recruit came to BYU with high expectations. But injuries and lack of playing time derailed his freshman season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ravens president talks Justin Tucker allegations at NFL's annual meeting
item.description: Baltimore Ravens president Sashi Brown spoke briefly about the investigation into the sexual misconduct allegations against kicker Justin Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York officials cancel horse racing at racetrack over 'unacceptable noise levels' from nearby casino
item.description: The New York Racing Association said it had to cancel a full day of racing at Aqueduct on Sunday due to an auto show at a nearby casino.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A's debut home opener in Sacramento
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time in 57 years, Bay Area Athletics fans will not be able to drive to the ballpark to watch the A's play at the Oakland Coliseum. However, fans can drive 68 miles north on Interstate 80 for the A’s new home: Sutter Health Park in West Sacramento.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: RSL gets shut out again at Minnesota United, 2-0
item.description: ST. PAUL (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, and third overall this MLS season, Real Salt Lake failed to score a goal in a 2-0 shutout at Minnesota United Saturday night. Tani Oluwaseyi recorded a brace to help Minnesota United hand Real Salt Lake its fourth loss of the season. Dayne St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers' former No 3 draft pick Trey Lance draws interest from CFL team
item.description: The CFL's Saskatchewan Roughriders reportedly added Trey Lance to their negotiation list as his time with the Dallas Cowboys came to an end in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angel Reese has fiery message for critics after announcing controversial rapper as next guest
item.description: Chicago Sky star player Angel Reese fired back at critics who were vocal about their disappointment that the WNBA star was interviewing a controversial rapper.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Miguel Amaya has 2 doubles and 5 RBIs to lead the Cubs past the Diamondbacks 10-6
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Miguel Amaya hit two doubles and had five RBIs, Ian Happ added a homer, double and three RBIs and the Chicago Cubs beat the Arizona Diamondbacks 10-6 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey's half-court buzzer beater completes miraculous comeback against Lakers, 119-117
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz lose for 14th time in last 15 games, 121-110
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Alperen Sengun had 33 points and 10 rebounds, Amen Thompson finished with 16 points, 10 rebounds and five assists, and the Houston Rockets beat the Utah Jazz 121-110 on Thursday night. The Jazz have now lost 14 of its last 15 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lightning strike early and often in 8-0 win over Utah HC
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club will need close to a miracle to make the NHL playoffs now. After suffering its worst blowout loss of the season, coupled with a St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres rally in seventh inning to win home opener against Braves
item.description: The Padres kicked off the 2025-2026 season with a comeback victory over the Atlanta Braves Thursday at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-NFL player charged after 190 dogs seized from Oklahoma dog fighting venture
item.description: An Oklahoma man is facing federal charges after officials seized 190 dogs from an animal fighting venture, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, WGN 9

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors' Stephen Curry won't play in Miami, 2nd straight game missed with pelvic contusion
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Stephen Curry is going to take a little more time to heal. Curry remained out of Golden State's lineup Tuesday night for a game against the Miami Heat, the second straight game he has missed with a pelvic contusion.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Softball: Bonita Vista 3, Mission Hills 1
item.description: A competitive softball matchup between Bonita Vista and Mission Hills in the Mater Dei Invitational at Palomar College.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: How the San Diego Padres got their name
item.description: The San Diego Padres' name is a tribute to the city's history, with the team's name coming from the Franciscan Friars who founded the area.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
